text: My acne has completely dminished...i have the occasional break-out, but on a an everyday consistent basis i am now acne-free due to Retin-A! It helps to take a break while using it because your skin will become used to it, however after a few weeks off, the effects are just as wondederful to your skin as when you first began. Peeling, dryness, sun sensitivity I applied a small amount of Retin-A every evening before bed and washed if off in the morning. If you are able to get through the initial stage which includes the side effects (peeling, dry skin, redness, irritation, and sun sensitivity) your skin will emerge better looking and healthier in the end.
